Title: Inky reconfiguration for ACU
Notes: Investigated and remediated an INKY deployment issue for client ACU where reinstallation of the service was failing due to tenant group membership restrictions. Engaged with INKY support to review the error related to the IPW-Group-Silent group and confirmed that a reinstall was required instead of a simple reconfiguration. Performed a full uninstall of the existing legacy INKY installation, followed by a guided reinstall as advised by support. Verified successful completion of the installation, license redemption, and tenant activation status. Reviewed post-install behavior, confirmed that the tenant would initially appear inactive and later update to active status, and validated group configuration mapping between Microsoft 365 (“Inky Users” group) and the INKY portal. Addressed API permission warnings by confirming legacy install limitations and validated that users can be managed directly via M365 group membership. Installation confirmed as successful.
